info.title: NEAR x402 demo paid work API (testnet)
info.description: Deterministic paid work demo behind the NEAR x402 facilitator at test.x402.mikedotexe.com. Payment is 1,000 atomic units of Circle test-USDC on NEAR testnet per request, settled through NEP-366 signed delegates with relayer-sponsored gas.

post.summary: Deterministic SHA-256 work, paid via x402 (NEAR testnet USDC)
post.description: Unpaid requests receive a 402 with x402 v2 payment requirements in the base64 PAYMENT-REQUIRED header. Resubmit with a PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header containing the signed payment payload (the payment-identifier extension is required). Replaying the identical paid request returns the cached result without a second settlement; reusing a payment identifier with different work is rejected.

input.description: Arbitrary input string; the result is the deterministic SHA-256 digest of the canonical request body

200.description: Deterministic work result (replayed is true when served from the delivery journal)

402.description: x402 payment required; requirements are in the base64 PAYMENT-REQUIRED response header

409.description: Payment identifier already used for different work
